title: Secrets of a Ballerina
actors: Pierre Blanchar, Micheline Presle, Geneviève Morel
plot: The French Secrets of a Ballerina is based on Honore de Balzac's Un Seul Amour. The title character is ballet-star Clara Biondi (Micheline Presle), whose peak years are shown in flashback. Clara finds herself victimized by blackma...
